.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(164, 135, 131) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(75, 33, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.tag.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FCFEF3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FCFEF3, color-mix(in srgb, #FCFEF3 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #FCFEF3 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#FCFEF3, color-mix(in srgb, #FCFEF3 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(75, 33, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(75, 33, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(75, 33, 57) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(127, 108, 94) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(252, 254, 243) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgba(75, 33, 57, 0.035) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgba(75, 33, 57, 0.035) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgba(75, 33, 57, 0.035) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
